T6.final: कल का दिन आपके लिए नई उम्मीदों और संभावनाओं से भरा हो—हर छोटा कदम आपको आपके सपनों के करीब ले जाता है। विश्वास रखिए, आप जो भी कर रहे हैं, वह मायने रखता है। 🌟
कल का दिन आपके लिए नई उम्मीदों और संभावनाओं से भरा हो। हर सुबह एक नया मौका लेकर आती है—उसे खोलिए, विश्वास रखिए, और आगे बढ़िए। आपका परिश्रम रंग लाएगा। शुभ कल! 🌟
कल का दिन आपके लिए नई आशा और संभावनाओं से भरपूर हो—हर छोटा कदम आपके सपनों को साकार करने की दिशा में बढ़ता है। आपमें वो शक्ति है जो किसी भी चुनौती को अवसर में बदल दे। 🌟
कल का दिन नई आशाओं से भरपूर हो—हर छोटा कदम आपके सपनों की ओर ले जाता है। आपमें वो शक्ति है जो किसी भी चुनौती को बदल देती है। मुस्कुराइए, विश्वास रखिए, और कल को अपना सर्वश्रेष्ठ बनाइए। 🌟

कल के लिए एक छोटी सी प्रेरणा:  
"हर सुबह एक नया अवसर लेकर आती है। अपने सपनों पर विश्वास रखें, छोटे-छोटे प्रयासों से आगे बढ़ें, और देखिए कैसे कल आज के सपनों को साकार कर देगा।"

T7.final:
Arre yaar! Ghar pe hi chill karne ka plan? Perfect! Weekend ko ghar pe mast mazaak karne ke kai tarike hain. Sun le:

**Chill Mode Activated:**
1. **Movie/Series Marathon** - Apni favorite comfort show ya nayi web series binge karo. Popcorn, snacks, blanket fort banalo!
2. **Gaming Session** - Agar PC/console hai toh friends ke saath online multiplayer ya solo adventure. Ya fir purani board games nikalo!
3. **Cooking Adventure** - Nayi recipe try karo! Maggi se leke gourmet tak - kuch naya banana. Banakeela banana. Ya fir apni maa ki recipe se nostalgia trip.
4. **DIY Spa Day** - Face mask, malish, aromatic candles... apni apni spa banalo ghar me.
5. **Creative Corner** - Sketching, writing, ya kuch seekhna (guitar, language app, etc.). Dimag ko taza hawa dena.
6. **Virtual Hangout** - Friends ke saath Zoom/Discord pe chai peelo, games khelo, ya bas bakbak karo.
7. **Playlist Party** - Apni mood ke hisab se playlist banao - chill, upbeat, ya retro throwback. Dance karo ya bas suno.

Aur haan... phone thoda keeda maro, screen time kam karo, bas apne aap ko relax karne do. Weekend ka matlab hai - **no rush, no stress, just YOU time.**

Koi specific interest hai joh plan mein add karna chahte ho? Gaming, movies, cooking... batana, mai customize plan bana deta hoon! 😎

Arre yaar, ghar pe chill karne ka weekend plan? Mast lag raha hai! 😎 Ek simple lekin enjoyable schedule deta hoon—apni mood ke hisab se adjust kar lo:

**Shanivar (Saturday)**
- **Subah 9-10 baje**: Der tak sona (weekend ka maza!), phir chai/coffee ke saath lite stretching ya yoga (bas 10-15 min, 15 min).
- **10:30-12 baje**: Nashta—kuch naya try karo: avocado toast, masala omelette, ya leftover pizza ko upgrade karo (toppings daalo, bake karo).
- **12-3 baje**: Screen time! Koi binge-worthy series (ex: *The Office*, *Mirzapur*, *Stranger Things* ya koi anime) ya movie marathon. Popcorn, nachos, ya fruit chaat ke saath.
- **3-5 baje**: Chhota break—baahari hawa (agar balcony/terrace hai), ya ek short walk ghar ke andar. Phir agar gaming ka shauq hai to ek round multiplayer (Valorant, FIFA, GTA Online) ya ek solo adventure game (Hades, Stardew Valley).
- **5-7 baje**: Snack time—maggie, samosa, ya fruit salad. Phir ek chhota creative task: sketching, journaling, ya kuch DIY (like candle making, origami).
- **7-9 baje**: Dinner—kuch special banaye: pasta, biryani, ya paneer tikka. Agar cooking ka mood nahi hai to order karo le favorite se.
- **9-11 baje**: Chill vibes—lo-fi beats, podcast ya audiobook sunte hue light reading (comic, magazine, ya ebook). Ya phir ek late-night game session dostoon ke saath.

**Itwar (Sunday)**
- **Subah 8-9 baje**: Der tak sona, phir detox water (lemon-mint) ke saath light breakfast (fruit, yogurt, granola).
- **9:30-11 baje**: “Me time”—meditation, journaling, ya ek short online course (Skillshare, YouTube tutorial kisi hobby ke liye).
- **11-1 baje**: Ghar ka chhota refresh—apni almirah/desk ka ek corner organize karo, ya plants ko water do.
- **1-3 baje**: Lunch—simple aur healthy: khichdi, salad, ya wrap.
- **3-5 baje**: Outdoor vibe agar mumkin ho—terrace par chai, ya ek short drive (agar mann kare). Warna, ghar pe hi ek naya recipe try karo (dessert ya snack).
- **5-7 baje**: Prep for week—outfit select karo, bag pack karo, ya Sun

Arre yaar, weekend pe ghar pe chill karne ka maza hi kuch aur hai! 😎 Kuch mast plan deta hoon:

1️⃣ **Movie/Web Series Marathon** - Apni favourite genre ki list bana lo (comedy, thriller, ya rom-com). Popcorn, snacks ke saath full paisa vasool time.

2️⃣ **Gaming Session** - Agar PC/console hai toh friends ke saath online multiplayer ya solo adventure games. Naya game try kar lo.

3️⃣ **Cooking Experiment** - Nahi tried koi recipe? YouTube se dekho aur try karo. Maggi se lekar gourmet tak - kuch naya banake khana apni tarah ka satisfaction deta hai.

4️⃣ **Chill + Creative** - Drawing, sketching, ya even adult coloring books. Music bajate hue bas apni creativity ko flow kar do.

5️⃣ **Learn Something Fun** - Short online course (photography, coding basics, ya even magic tricks). Ek naya skill seek lo - future ke liye investment!

6️⃣ **Home Spa Day** - Face mask, foot soak, aromatic candles. Apne aap ko pamper kar lo - stress door, freshness aayega.

7️⃣ **Book Nook** - Woh book jo months se shelf par padi hai, usse finally shuru karo. Chai/coffee ke saath perfect combination.

8️⃣ **Virtual Travel** - Google Earth se kisi exotic place ka tour, ya museum ke virtual visits. Ghar baithe hi dunia ghoomo!

Bas yaad rakho - plan ki zaroorat nahi, bas apni mood ke according karo. Sabse important: phone thoda door rakho, apne aap ko truly relax do time milna.

Kaisa laga plan? Koi specific interest hai joh follow karna chahta ho? 😊

Arre yaar, ghar pe chill karne ka weekend toh mast ho sakta hai! Ekdum relaxed vibe ke liye kuch ideas:

🎬 **Movie/Series Marathon**  
- Theme select karo: 90s Bollywood classics, Hollywood thriller series, ya anime marathon  
- Popcorn, snacks, comfy blanket ke saath setup karo  
- Agar saath koi hai toh double feature ya voting game khelo

🎮 **Gaming Session**  
- PC/console pe favorite multiplayer game (Valorant, GTA, FIFA etc.)  
- Ya board games/card games agar offline mode chahiye  
- Online friends ke saath voice chat ke saath play karo

🍳 **Cooking Adventure**  
- Naya recipe try karo: homemade pizza, pasta, ya desi chole bhature  
- YouTube se tutorial dekho cooking videos aur saath saath banate jao  
- Dessert nahi bhoolna - chocolate mug cake ya gulab jamun

🎨 **Creative Chill**  
- Drawing/sketching, ya adult coloring books  
- DIY home decor: photo frame decorate karo, ya fairy lights se corner banaye  
- Yaar, journal likho ya poetry likho - dil ki baat nikal jaati hai

📚 **Relax & Recharge**  
- Favorite book padho ya audiobook suno  
- Spotify/YouTube pe chill playlist lofi beats ya ghazals  
- Yoga/meditation ke 20 minutes liyo - weekend ka stress door ho jayega

🌿 **Mini Spa at Home**  
- Face mask, foot soak, ya hot shower ke baad body massage  
- Scented candles ya agarbatti jalakar ambience banaye  
- Chameli ya lavender ka tel use karo - bahut relaxing hota hai

Sabse important: **pressure mat lo**! Weekend ka matlab hai apni marzi ka kaam karna, pressure-free. Ekdum slow motion mein jeeo - bas itna hi.

Koi specific interest hai johpe focus karna chahiye? Movies, games, cooking ya kuch aur? Batao, main specific suggestions deta hoon! 😊

Arre yaar, ghar pe chill karne ka best plan! Weekend ke liye kuch aise ideas deta hoon:

🎬 **Movie/Series Marathon** - Apni favorite genre ki list bana lo (comedy, thriller, ya desi masala). Popcorn, snacks, aur comfortable seating setup kar lo. Netflix/Amazon Prime pe koi naya show bhi dekh sakte ho.

🎮 **Gaming Session** - Agar PC/console hai toh multiplayer games karo ya ek achhi story-driven game complete karo. Ya phir mobile pe kisi friends ke saath online ludo/call of duty mobile.

🍳 **Cooking Experiment** - Nahi banaaya koi recipe kabhi? Weekend perfect time hai! YouTube pe koi easy recipe dekho (pasta, pancakes, ya kke, ya desi chole bhature). Cooking karte waqt apni favorite music bajao.

📚 **Chill Reading Corner** - Agar padhne ka shauk hai toh ek achhi book, chai/coffee, aur comfy corner bana lo. Ya phir audiobook suno jab aaram kar rahe ho.

🎨 **Creative Time** - Drawing, painting, DIY crafts, ya phir guitar/keyboard practice. Kuch naya seekhne ka maza kuch aur hi hota hai.

🧘 **Self-Care Spa** - Ghar pe hi facial, hair mask, ya thoda yoga/meditation. Weekend ko refresh hone ka perfect time hai.

🎧 **Music & Podcast Party** - Apni favorite playlist banao ya koi interesting podcast suno (comedy, tech, ya true crime). Dance karo ya bas suno aur relax karo.

Chalo, pehle decide karo ki aaj ka mood kya hai - active chahiye ya pure relax? Aur haan, phone ki notification thodi kam kar lo, true weekend vibe ke liye! 

Koi specific plan chahiye joh main detail se bata doon? 😊

T9.final:
We need to output JSON with subtasks array, each with title and spec. No prose, no code fences. Must split into at most 4 independent subtasks, each self-contained, no dependencies, no touching same files. So we need to decide tasks: maybe frontend UI (HTML/CSS/JS), backend API (Node/Express or Python Flask), data storage (maybe localStorage or simple file), charting library integration, CSV export functionality, README. But each subtask must be independent and not share files. So we need to assign distinct file sets per subtask.

We could have:

1. Frontend UI: expense entry form, display monthly charts, using Chart.js, with HTML/CSS/JS files (index.html, style.css, script.js). No backend.

2. Backend API: Node/Express server providing endpoints to save expenses (maybe to a JSON file), retrieve monthly data, export CSV. Files: server.js, data.json (or maybe a separate data folder). But note CSV export may need to generate CSV from data.

3. Data persistence layer: maybe a simple SQLite or JSON file handling, but could be part of backend.

But we need to ensure subtasks do not touch same files. So each subtask's files must be distinct.

We can break as:

- Subtask 1: Frontend (HTML/CSS/JS) that includes a form and uses Chart.js to render charts based on data fetched from a mock API endpoint (maybe using fetch to /api/expenses). It will not implement backend; just assumes API exists.

- Subtask 2: Backend API (Node/Express) that provides REST endpoints for expenses (GET, POST) and CSV export (GET /export). It will read/write a data file (expenses.json) in its own directory.

- Subtask 3: Data model & storage utilities: maybe a module that handles reading/writing expenses.json, but that would be used by backend, causing dependency. Better to incorporate storage into backend subtask.

We have limit 4 subtasks. Could also have:

- Subtask 3: Chart generation library integration (maybe a separate JS module that takes data and draws chart). But that could be part of front
